privileged_info_summary: The task refactors a Java 17 POJO class (BeamSetup) into a Record type. The target class is com.medsys.rt.model.BeamSetup in project /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/RadiationTherapy. The dependent class com.medsys.rt.service.TreatmentPlan uses BeamSetup's getBeamId() and getGantryAngle() methods and will require updates to use Record accessors (beamId() and gantryAngle()). The validation logic that must be preserved is: gantry angle must be between 0 and 360 degrees, enforced via constructor validation throwing IllegalArgumentException. The test case testInvalidGantryAngle verifies this validation. The project uses Maven for building, JUnit Jupiter 5.9.2 for testing, and Java 17 as the target version.
